label: professional_details
value: Registered nurse with an advanced wound care certification, eager to integrate new skills into daily responsibilities, now pursuing a BSN full-time with a scholarship, involved in a community health initiative requiring flexible hours

label: health_and_wellness_preferences
value: Maintains a flexitarian meal plan for energy levels, continues practicing yoga and meditation for stress management

label: dietary_preferences
value: Interested in flexitarian meal plans that are allergy-friendly, avoiding the top eight allergens (milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, fish, shellfish, soy, and wheat)

label: miscellaneous_information
value: Interested in recent articles and books on medical technology and patient stories

label: activity_and_service_preferences
value: Interested in budget-friendly options for tools like Trello, Notion, Google Calendar, Calendly, Doodle, Pomodoro Technique Apps (e.g., Pomodone), Forest, Headspace, Calm, Yummly, Mealime, Slack, and Microsoft Teams for organizing, time management, focus, health and wellness, meal planning, and volunteer coordination

label: important_personal_details
value: Kids moved back home recently, spending more time with them; managing increased work demands at the hospital without neglecting family

label: plans_and_intentions
value: Setting long-term goals and breaking them down into smaller milestones to manage time better between work, studying, and family
